data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

## Testing Mode
GREEN

AC added via sprint orchestrator (original ticket had no AC section).

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] merge-to-main.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | awk '$1 < 1000'
- [ ] validate.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh | awk '$1 < 1000'
- [ ] validate-review-output.sh is under 1000 lines after extraction
  Verify: wc -l $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh | awk '$1 < 1000'
- [ ] Extracted utility functions placed in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/ using flat naming convention (no lib-*.sh prefix)
  Verify: ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/*.sh | head -5
- [ ] All shell scripts remain syntactically valid
  Verify: for f in $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh; do bash -n "$f" && echo "OK: $f"; done
